calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Donald Eric Hall To Perpetuate Testimony Of Donald Hall By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Feb-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff Donald Eric Hall.
Jocelyn M. Soriano of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing for defendant Kaiser Gypsum.
Taylor Matsumoto of BERKES CRANE ROBINSON & SEAL LLP (213-955-1150), appearing for defendant Fluor Corporation.
Natalie Garcia Lashinsky of DENTONS US LLP (415-882-5013), appearing for defendant MetalClad Insulation LLC.
Seana Azad of of POND NORTH LLP (415-217-1240), appearing for defendant Fraser's Boiler Service, Inc.
Gavin Whitis of WFBM, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant Boss Manufacturing.
Ingrid Calle of WILSON ELSER MOSKOWITZ EDELMAN & DICKER LLP (213-330-8836) appearing for defendant Atlantic Rich Field Company via Court Call.
Ashley L. Rivkin of MANNING, GROSS & MASSENBURG (213-622-7300) appearing for defendant Goodyear via Court Call.

Counsel met and confer off the record regarding date and time for deposition to take place. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER DONALD HALL's Petition To Perpetuate Testimony Of Donald Hall By Videotaped Deposition:

The Petition of Donald Eric Hall to Perpetuate Testimony of Donald Hall by Videotaped Deposition is granted. The Court finds that the discovery requested may prevent a failure or delay of justice. (CCP 2035.050(a).) The Court did not consider the opposition filed by Fluor Corporation for failure to lodge courtesy copies with the Court. (Local Rule 2.7B.) The deposition will occur at or near the home of Donald Hall in Clarksville, Indiana, as soon as possible within the next 30-60 days. Location: Clarksville, Indiana. Date and Time: April 28, 2020 at 9:00am (EST). All parties are to file notice of appearance within 48 hours of the hearing.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: S. Le. Reporter: Kelly Roemer of AIKEN WELCH, CSR # 6435, kroemer@aikenwelch.com (Tel: 877-451-1580). (503/CML)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Donald Eric Hall To Perpetuate Testimony Of Donald Hall By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Continued To Feb-20-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 503
